progress_summary: Gate run for the roadmap renumber: Opchain for Codex (MCP server, PR #260 — originally slated v1.4.3, tabled to v1.8) promoted to v1.5; AI app → v1.6, instrumentation → v1.7, distribution → v1.8. Touched roadmap-static.ts, changelog.astro, the changelog e2e spec, and roadmap/07+08 memos. Validated: vitest 345/345, astro check 0 errors, astro build 35 pages, worker esbuild clean, npm audit 0 vulns, anti-pattern + secret scan clean on staged files. Playwright e2e not run locally (chromium CDN blocked in this sandbox) — built /changelog HTML manually verified against the spec's assertions (hero title, #v1-6/#v1-7/#v1-8 cards, 7 vote targets incl. OPC-143 + OPC-150); browser e2e runs in CI.
next_actions: Push claude/sweet-allen-0iq4mo and open the PR; watch the changelog e2e spec in CI.
On merge to main, deploy is manual: npm run deploy:staging, eyeball staging.opchain.dev/changelog, then npm run deploy.
